name: Prune Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup prunes, cooked and pitted, then chopped
1 cup buttermilk (regular milk can be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the eggs, sugar, and oil until well combined.
2. Add the chopped prunes and stir until incorporated.
3. Sift together the flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, cloves, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Dissolve the baking soda in the buttermilk (or regular milk) in another small bowl.
5. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture, alternating with the buttermilk mixture. Stir well after each addition.
6. Mix in the vanilla and nuts.
7. Pour the batter into an ungreased angel food pan or Bundt cake pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for one hour, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
9. Makes a wonderfully moist prune cake. Enjoy in moderation.
